hero.role: IT Enthusiast · Web Developer · Vocational Student

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who is Felix?
about.tagline: 5-time national & international gold medalist — building an IT career while chasing a scholarship to China 🇨🇳
about.bio1: My name is Felix Raymond Tan. I was born and raised in Medan — a vibrant, energetic city that has a unique way of shaping the people who grow up within it. As the eldest of three siblings, responsibility wasn't something I chose; it simply grew alongside me.
about.bio2: For twelve years, I spent my education at a single school — Global Prima National Plus School. From kindergarten through junior high, I didn't just learn subjects; I learned to persevere, adapt, and discover what I was truly passionate about. In 9th grade, I found it: the first lines of HTML I ever wrote felt like discovering a new language — one capable of turning ideas into something real.
about.bio3: In 2024, I chose to enroll at SMK Telkom 2 Medan, majoring in Computer and Network Engineering. It wasn't by chance — it was a carefully considered decision. And soon after, I proved it was the right one: Grand Champion in Informatics at OSTN 2024 became my first national victory.
about.bio4: 2025 seemed relentless in its surprises. Grand Champion at OPSI, a Gold Medal at the international IYSHO, a Gold Medal at PON representing North Sumatra, and a Gold Medal at OSI HP — all within a single year. Amid all of that, I also completed the DBS Foundation Coding Camp, producing MindSpark — a gamification-based learning platform I'm proud of down to every line of code.
about.bio5: Beyond the numbers and medals, there's another side that matters just as much. I serve as Head of the IT Division in OSIS, help document activities for the Cetiya Aryavamsa Buddhist community, and occasionally teach basic web coding to friends who want to learn.
about.bio6: There's one dream that has always lived in my mind: pursuing a bachelor's degree on a scholarship to China. Not simply because China is the world's technology hub, but because I believe — learning at the source is the best way to truly understand. The Mandarin I'm studying now isn't just a language; it's a bridge toward that dream.
about.bio7: If you ask who Felix Raymond Tan is — I'm someone who isn't finished yet. Still learning, still growing, and still deeply excited about what lies ahead.
about.fact_badminton: Playing badminton to reset my mind
about.fact_film: Favorite film: Big Brother — Donnie Yen at his finest
about.fact_nightowl: Most productive at night — a true night owl
about.fact_hokkien: Hokkien is the secret language at home
about.fact_camera: Always carry a camera — the best moments arrive unannounced
about.principle2: Study not for grades — but to truly understand.
about.principle3: Sharing knowledge doesn't diminish us — it multiplies us.
